motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def maximumLengthSubstring(self, s: str) -> int:
        max_len = 0
        left = 0
        char_count = {}
        
        for right in range(len(s)):
            char_count[s[right]] = char_count.get(s[right], 0) + 1
            
            while len(char_count) > 2 or (len(char_count) == 2 and list(char_count.values())[0] > list(char_count.values())[1]):
                char_count[s[left]] -= 1
                if char_count[s[left]] == 0:
                    del char_count[s[left]]
                left += 1
            
            max_len = max(max_len, right - left + 1)
        
        return max_len
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(min(n, m))
energy implications: LOW
